finding.root_cause_summary: Four module POMs declare `com.jcraft:jsch` without a `<version>` element (lines 54-57 in three files, line 59-62 in the fourth). Under Spring Boot 2.0.1 + Spring Cloud Finchley, jsch was resolved transitively via `spring-cloud-config-server`'s Git support. After the `upgrade_spring_boot_to_2_7` recipe bumps the Spring Boot/Spring Cloud versions, jsch is no longer a transitive dependency and is not managed by either `spring-boot-starter-parent` or the `spring-cloud-dependencies` BOM, so Maven rejects the unversioned declaration.
finding.fix_hint: Add `<version>0.1.55</version>` (or a managed property) inside each `<dependency>com.jcraft:jsch</dependency>` block across all four POMs.
